url.description: The seed URL to start crawling from. Must be a public http/https URL — no localhost, private IPs, or internal networks.

maxPages.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl. Set to 1 for single-page extraction.

maxDepth.description: Maximum link depth from the seed URL. Depth 1 = seed page only.

question.description: Optional LLM extraction question to answer from crawled content (e.g., 'Extract all product prices').
